allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('benchmarking.db'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\"'\); print\('Tables:', cur.fetchall\(\)\); cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies'\); print\('Companies:', cur.fetchone\(\)\); cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM kpi_data'\); print\('KPI rows:', cur.fetchone\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")
Bash(sqlite3 benchmarking.db "SELECT id, name FROM companies ORDER BY name;")
